productDisplayName: FILA Men Oliver Black Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteThe fila Oliver shoe is a lightweight performance shoe with a flexi outsole that embraces your foot to mimic its movements. This shoe is perfect for casual wear -  style it with a monochrome tee and your favourite denims!Product DetailsBlunt toed felt and mesh upper with central lace-upsPadded mesh inner with branding at the tongue and heelThick lightweight rubber outsole with deep flex grooves extending to the peripheryMaterial and CareMesh, feltWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
